notes: HAL's Hole in One Golf is a golf simulation game, not a narrative-driven or conflict-based title. The game focuses on golf mechanics and gameplay rather than world-state communication, danger signaling, faction systems, or political situations. Golf games typically communicate state through UI elements (score, distance, wind) rather than environmental manifestations or faction identity. No manifestation layer data applicable to this paradigm.
reason: Game paradigm mismatch: Golf simulation games do not employ the narrative communication systems (danger signals, faction indicators, political state visualization, environmental storytelling for conflict/survival context) that the Manifestation Layer framework is designed to extract. Available source (TCRF) contains no usable content for this analysis. This extraction framework is optimized for action, RPG, strategy, and narrative-driven games with world-state communication requirements.
